---
name: Data correction
about: Report a value in the dataset that conflicts with current evidence
title: 'Correction: [Corridor] / [Sub-zone] / [Field]'
labels: 'correction'
assignees: ''
---

## Affected sub-zone

- **Corridor:** (e.g. `Canggu`, `Bukit`, `Seminyak`, `Ubud`, `Sanur`)
- **Sub-zone:** (e.g. `Berawa`, `Pererenan`, `Bingin / Padang Padang`)

## Field affected

(One of: `tier`, `grossYieldRange`, `netYieldRange`, `occupancyRange`, `adrPeak`, `adrShoulder`, `adrLow`, `entryPriceRange`, `notes`, or `_meta`)

## Current value in dataset

```
(paste the current value from data/bali-corridor-yields.json)
```

## Proposed correction

```
(paste the proposed new value)
```

## Evidence

What supports the correction? Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 sources preferred:

- [ ] AirDNA report covering the period
- [ ] Recent transaction data (anonymised price-per-sqm)
- [ ] Knight Frank, Global Property Guide, or similar institutional reference
- [ ] Operator-published occupancy / ADR data
- [ ] Direct observation (please describe period and methodology)

**Please link or paste source evidence below:**

(paste sources)

## Time period covered

(e.g. "current quarter Q2 2026", "rolling 12 months ending April 2026")

## Confidence

- [ ] High — multiple Tier 1 / Tier 2 sources align
- [ ] Medium — one strong Tier 1 source plus secondary corroboration
- [ ] Directional — observation-based, no formal source

## Additional context

(any other context the maintainers should know)
